% Lang: en

\textbf{Imitator --- Multimodal Sign Language Translation \enspace\href{\detokenize{https://github.com/nakato156/Multimodal-Sign-Language-Model}}{[GitHub]}} \hfill \textit{Publication: Springer CCIS 2026 · SIMBIG 2025 · WAILAMP 2025}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.2em, itemsep=1pt, topsep=2pt]
  \item Reformulated sign language translation as alignment in an LLM latent space, avoiding gloss as an intermediate representation
  \item Designed an architecture with latent queries and cross-attention that projects keypoint sequences into token-aligned embeddings, decoupling temporal input length from output length
  \item Showed that embedding imitation enables robust learning in low-resource settings, with stable alignment (MSE + cosine $\approx$ 8e-4) without retraining the LLM
\end{itemize}

\vspace{2pt}

\textbf{GENO-MAP --- Correspondence-Free Diagnostics for High-Dimensional Data \enspace\href{\detokenize{https://github.com/R0SEWT/GENO-MAP_Correspondence-Free-Diagnostics-for-Sweet-Potato-Diversity-Maps}}{[GitHub]}} \hfill \textit{PCA, UMAP, kNN Graphs}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.2em, itemsep=1pt, topsep=2pt]
  \item Designed a correspondence-free validation framework based on kNN graph invariants to evaluate neighborhood structure in high-dimensional representations
  \item Showed that neighborhood structure remains robust under severe perturbations, with continuous degradation and no phase transitions
  \item Showed that PCA preserves structural stability better than autoencoders, and that UMAP changes the visualization rather than the analytical graph
  \item Presented as a poster at SALA 2026, validating the approach on real-world data without explicit correspondence
\end{itemize}

\vspace{2pt}

\textbf{ArbitrIA --- Legal Retrieval System [Restricted]} \hfill \textit{LlamaIndex, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Docker}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.2em, itemsep=1pt, topsep=2pt]
  \item Designed a retrieval system for Peruvian arbitration documents, combining document-level and chunk-level indexing to improve precision on complex queries
  \item Implemented robust pipelines for heterogeneous PDFs, including multi-column layouts, embedded tables, and inconsistent headers
  \item Evaluated chunking strategies and showed that finer segmentation improves local precision while hurting global retrieval, motivating dual indexing
\end{itemize}

\vspace{2pt}

\textbf{Gallstone Risk --- ML for Resource-Constrained Screening\enspace\href{\detokenize{https://gallstone.rosewt.dev/}}{[Demo]}\enspace\href{\detokenize{https://github.com/R0SEWT/gallstone-risk-rural-peru-ml}}{[GitHub]}} \hfill \textit{XGBoost, SHAP, Optuna}
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=1.2em, itemsep=1pt, topsep=2pt]
  \item Reframed gallstone prediction as a decision system under observability constraints, removing dependence on clinical variables unavailable in the field
  \item Evaluated the trade-off between predictive performance and operational viability, showing controlled degradation as the feature space is reduced
  \item Designed a human-in-the-loop inspection interface for individual predictions and feature sensitivity analysis with SHAP
\end{itemize}
